channel.title: Sound on Built by Nikhil
channel.description: Recent content in Sound on Built by Nikhil

item.title: Day 11: Buzzer — Make Noise and a Simple Melody
item.description: Day 11 of Learn Coding with Arduino — connect a piezo buzzer and use tone() to play beeps, notes, and a short melody.

item.title: Day 20: Sound Sensor — Clap to Control
item.description: Day 20 of Learn Coding with Arduino — wire up a KY-038 sound sensor, detect claps, and toggle an LED with a sound.

item.title: Day 21: Dual-Mode Control — IR Remote + Sound
item.description: Day 21 of Learn Coding with Arduino — combine the IR remote and sound sensor into one sketch with manual and auto modes, with the LCD showing the current state.
